name: Get-MgSubscribedSku
description: List the tenant's purchased SKUs with prepaid units, consumed units, free seats.

name: Get-MgUserLicenseDetail
description: List licenses currently assigned to a user.

name: Set-MgUserLicense-Add
description: Assign one license SKU to a user. Wrapper around Set-MgUserLicense -AddLicenses.

name: Set-MgUserLicense-Remove
description: Remove one license SKU from a user. Wrapper around Set-MgUserLicense -RemoveLicenses.

name: Get-LicenseUtilizationReport
description: Run the Phase 4 cost optimizer; returns inactive / hoarder / paid-unassigned / downgrade-candidate findings.

DaysInactive.description: Inactivity threshold for inactive licensed users
